hero.headline: Know where your money goes
hero.subtitle: Upload your statement or snap a receipt. AI categorises everything.
hero.success: You're on the list! We'll notify you soon.

features.title: How does it work?
features.scanDesc: Take a photo of your receipt or payment screenshot. AI extracts amount, merchant, and category instantly.
features.importDesc: Upload your bank statement as PDF or CSV. AI parses all your transactions at once.
features.insightsDesc: Automatic weekly summaries. Spending predictions. Suggestions to reach your goals.
features.forWhomTitle: Who it's for and who it isn't
features.forWhom: If you want to see where your money goes without connecting your bank and without someone selling you mutual funds or generic advice.
features.notForWhom: If you're looking for a bot that tells you to "invest in the S&P 500" every time you open the app, Fintrk isn't for you.

security.title: Your privacy comes first
security.encryptionDesc: Your data encrypted in transit and at rest (AES-256). Not even we can see your data.
security.aiDesc: Your photos are analyzed and deleted. AI never trains on your data. Ever.
security.gdprDesc: Real account deletion with one click. We comply with European data protection regulations.
security.noBankConnect: We don't connect to your bank
security.noBankConnectDesc: You upload the statement. We never touch your banking credentials. Ever.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Take a photo of your receipt or banking app screenshot and AI extracts the data automatically. Just confirm and you're done.
faq.a2: AES-256 encryption at rest and in transit. GDPR compliant. Not even we can see your financial data.
faq.a3: 7 days free, then €4.99/month (or €39/year — 34% off). No lock-in.
faq.a4: Any bank that exports PDF or CSV: Revolut, ING, BBVA, Chase, N26, and many more.
faq.q5: Do you connect to my bank?
faq.a5: No. You upload the statement whenever you want. We never ask for your banking credentials and never use aggregation services. This is a design choice, not a shortcoming.
faq.q6: What if the AI picks the wrong category?
faq.a6: Change it with a tap. If you correct the same category twice, the app creates an automatic rule and stops asking.
faq.a7: Yes. No lock-in, no weird clauses. Cancel from iPhone Settings or inside the app.

footer.description: Track your finances with artificial intelligence.
